mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_SUGA_MST ( FEE_CODE , FEE_TYPE , START_DT , END_DT , CLASS_NO , KOR_NM, ENG_NM, DIV_TYPE , SURG_YN , CLN_PRICE , HOS_PRICE , DNT_PRICE, PBL_PRICE, MID_PRICE, ORH_PRICE , RLT_VALUE , COPAY_50 , COPAY_80 , COPAY_90 , DUP_YN , CALC_NM , SEC_MAJ , SEC_MIN , SUB_CAT , REG_DTTM , REG_USER , REG_IP , UPD_DTTM , UPD_USER , UPD_IP ) VALUES ( #{fee_code} , #{fee_type} , #{start_dt} , #{end_dt} , #{class_no} , #{kor_nm} , #{eng_nm} , #{div_type} , #{surg_yn} , #{cln_price} , #{hos_price} , #{dnt_price} , #{pbl_price} , #{mid_price}, #{orh_price} , #{rlt_value} , #{copay_50} , #{copay_80} , #{copay_90} , #{dup_yn} , #{calc_nm} , #{sec_maj} , #{sec_min} , #{sub_cat} , #{reg_dttm} , #{reg_user} , #{reg_ip} , #{upd_dttm} , #{upd_user} , #{upd_ip} )

INSERT INTO TBL_SUGA_MST ( FEE_CODE, FEE_TYPE, START_DT, END_DT, CLASS_NO, KOR_NM, ENG_NM, DIV_TYPE, SURG_YN, CLN_PRICE, HOS_PRICE, DNT_PRICE, PBL_PRICE, MID_PRICE, ORH_PRICE, RLT_VALUE, COPAY_50, COPAY_80, COPAY_90, DUP_YN, CALC_NM, SEC_MAJ, SEC_MIN, SUB_CAT, REG_DTTM, REG_USER, REG_IP ) VALUES
( #{item.fee_code}, #{item.fee_type}, #{item.start_dt}, #{item.end_dt}, #{item.class_no}, #{item.kor_nm}, #{item.eng_nm}, #{item.div_type}, #{item.surg_yn}, #{item.cln_price}, #{item.hos_price}, #{item.dnt_price}, #{item.pbl_price}, #{item.mid_price}, #{item.orh_price}, #{item.rlt_value}, #{item.copay_50}, #{item.copay_80}, #{item.copay_90}, #{item.dup_yn}, #{item.calc_nm}, #{item.sec_maj}, #{item.sec_min}, #{item.sub_cat}, NOW(), #{item.reg_user}, #{item.reg_ip} )
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_SUGA_MST WHERE 1=1
AND (KOR_NM LIKE CONCAT(#{kor_nm}, '%') OR FEE_CODE LIKE CONCAT(#{kor_nm}, '%'))

SELECT FEE_CODE , FEE_TYPE , START_DT, END_DT, CLASS_NO, KOR_NM, ENG_NM, DIV_TYPE, SURG_YN, CLN_PRICE, HOS_PRICE, DNT_PRICE, PBL_PRICE , MID_PRICE , ORH_PRICE , RLT_VALUE , COPAY_50 , COPAY_80 , COPAY_90 , DUP_YN , CALC_NM , SEC_MAJ , SEC_MIN , SUB_CAT From TBL_SUGA_MST Where 1=1 And FEE_CODE = #{fee_code} And START_DT = #{start_dt}
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_SUGA_MST SET end_dt = #{end_dt}, fee_type = #{fee_type}, class_no = #{class_no}, kor_nm = #{kor_nm}, eng_nm = #{eng_nm}, div_type = #{div_type}, surg_yn = #{surg_yn}, cln_price = #{cln_price}, hos_price = #{hos_price}, dnt_price = #{dnt_price}, pbl_price = #{pbl_price}, mid_price = #{mid_price}, orh_price = #{orh_price}, rlt_value = #{rlt_value}, copay_50 = #{copay_50}, copay_80 = #{copay_80}, copay_90 = #{copay_90}, dup_yn = #{dup_yn}, calc_nm = #{calc_nm}, sec_maj = #{sec_maj}, sec_min = #{sec_min}, sub_cat = #{sub_cat}, upd_dttm = NOW(), upd_user = #{upd_user}, upd_ip = #{upd_ip} where 1=1 and FEE_CODE = #{fee_code} and start_dt = #{start_dt}
mapper.select:
SELECT CODE_CD , RTRIM(CODE_NM) CODE_NM , DATE_FORMAT(START_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') START_DT , DATE_FORMAT(END_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') END_DT, IFNULL(USE_YN,'') USE_YN , SORT , REG_DTTM , REG_USER , REG_IP , UPD_DTTM , UPD_USER , UPD_IP FROM TBL_CODE_MST WHERE 1=1
AND ( CODE_CD LIKE CONCAT('%',#{code_cd},'%') OR CODE_NM LIKE CONCAT('%',#{code_cd},'%') )
ORDER BY CODE_CD
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_CODE_MST (CODE_CD , CODE_NM , START_DT , END_DT , USE_YN , SORT , REG_DTTM , REG_USER , REG_IP , UPD_DTTM , UPD_USER , UPD_IP ) VALUES (#{code_cd}, #{code_nm}, REPLACE(#{start_dt} , '-', ''), REPLACE(#{end_dt} , '-', '') , #{use_yn}, #{sort}, NOW() , 'admin', '' , NOW() , 'admin', '' )
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_CODE_MST SET CODE_NM = #{code_nm}, END_DT = REPLACE(#{end_dt} , '-', '') , USE_YN = #{use_yn}, SORT = #{sort} , UPD_USER = 'admin' , UPD_DTTM = now() WHERE CODE_CD = #{code_cd}
UPDATE TBL_CODE_MST SET USE_YN = 'N', END_DT = REPLACE(#{end_dt} , '-', '') , UPD_USER = 'admin' , UPD_DTTM = now() WHERE CODE_CD = #{code_cd}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_CODE_DTL (CODE_GB , CODE_CD, SUB_CODE, SUB_CODE_NM, START_DT, END_DT, USE_YN, SORT, REG_DTTM , REG_USER , REG_IP , UPD_DTTM , UPD_USER , UPD_IP , PROP_1 , PROP_5 ) VALUES (#{code_gb}, #{code_cd}, #{sub_code}, #{sub_code_nm}, REPLACE(#{start_dt} , '-', ''), REPLACE(#{end_dt} , '-', '') , #{use_yn}, #{sort} , NOW() , 'admin' , '' , NOW() , 'admin' , '' , prop_1 , prop_5 )
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_CODE_DTL SET PROP_1 = #{prop_1} , PROP_5 = #{prop_5} , SUB_CODE_NM = #{sub_code_nm}, END_DT = REPLACE(#{end_dt},'-',''), USE_YN = #{use_yn}, SORT = #{sort}, UPD_DTTM = now() , UPD_USER = 'admin' WHERE CODE_CD = #{code_cd} AND SUB_CODE = #{sub_code} AND CODE_GB = #{code_gb}
mapper.select: SELECT CODE_CD, SUB_CODE_NM FROM TBL_CODE_DTL WHERE 1=1 AND CODE_CD = #{code_cd}
SELECT CODE_CD , CODE_NM FROM TBL_CODE_MST WHERE 1=1 AND CODE_CD = #{code_cd}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_USER_MST ( HOSP_CD, USER_ID, USER_NM, START_DT, END_DT, MAIN_GU, PASS_WD, PASS_CDT, BIGO, REG_DTTM, REG_USER, REG_IP, UPD_DTTM, UPD_USER, UPD_IP , USE_YN , HOSP_UUID , WINNER_YN , EMAIL , USER_TEL ) VALUES ( #{hosp_cd}, #{user_id}, #{user_nm}, REPLACE(#{start_dt} , '-', ''), REPLACE(#{end_dt} , '-', '') , #{main_gu}, #{pass_wd}, DATE_FORMAT(NOW(),'%Y-%m-%d') , #{bigo}, NOW(), #{reg_user}, #{reg_ip}, NOW(), #{upd_user}, #{upd_ip} , #{use_yn} , #{hosp_uuid} , #{winner_yn}, #{email} , #{user_tel} )
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_USER_MST SET USER_NM = #{user_nm}, MAIN_GU = #{main_gu}, BIGO = #{bigo}, USE_YN = #{use_yn}, UPD_DTTM = NOW(), UPD_USER = #{upd_user}, UPD_IP = #{upd_ip}, END_DT = REPLACE(#{end_dt} , '-', ''), HOSP_UUID = #{hosp_uuid} , WINNER_YN = #{winner_yn} , EMAIL = #{email} , USER_TEL = #{user_tel} WHERE HOSP_CD = #{hosp_cd} AND USER_ID = #{user_id} And START_DT = REPLACE(#{start_dt} , '-', '')
mapper.select:
SELECT HOSP_CD , USER_ID, USER_NM, DATE_FORMAT(START_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') START_DT , DATE_FORMAT(END_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') END_DT , MAIN_GU, PASS_WD, PASS_CDT, BIGO, REG_DTTM, REG_USER, REG_IP, UPD_DTTM, UPD_USER, UPD_IP , IFNULL(USE_YN,'') USE_YN , HOSP_UUID , WINNER_YN , EMAIL , USER_TEL FROM TBL_USER_MST WHERE 1=1
AND ( USER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%',#{user_nm},'%') OR USER_NM LIKE CONCAT('%',#{user_nm},'%') )
ORDER BY HOSP_CD ,USER_ID

SELECT HOSP_CD , TRIM(USER_ID) USER_ID , USER_NM, DATE_FORMAT(START_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') START_DT , DATE_FORMAT(END_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') END_DT , MAIN_GU, PASS_WD, PASS_CDT, BIGO, REG_DTTM, REG_USER, REG_IP, UPD_DTTM, UPD_USER, UPD_IP, USE_YN , HOSP_UUID , WINNER_YN , EMAIL , USER_TEL FROM TBL_USER_MST Where 1=1 And HOSP_UUID = #{hosp_uuid} And USER_ID = #{user_id} And START_DT = REPLACE(#{start_dt} , '-', '')
SELECT 'Y' FROM TBL_USER_MST Where 1=1 And USER_ID = #{user_id} LIMIT 1

SELECT HOSP_CD , TRIM(USER_ID) USER_ID , PASS_WD FROM TBL_USER_MST Where 1=1 And HOSP_UUID = #{hosp_uuid} And USER_ID = #{user_id}
ORDER BY START_DT DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT HOSP_CD, HOSP_NM, HOSP_ADDR, HOSP_EXTRADR, HOSP_CEO, BUSI_NUM, INACCD, DATE_FORMAT(START_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') START_DT , DATE_FORMAT(END_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') END_DT , DATE_FORMAT(JOIN_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') JOIN_DT , IFNULL(DATE_FORMAT(ACCEPT_DT, '%Y-%m-%d'),'') ACCEPT_DT , IFNULL(DATE_FORMAT(CLOSE_DT, '%Y-%m-%d'),'') CLOSE_DT , HOSP_TEL , HOSP_FAX , ZIP_CD , USE_YN, WARDCNT, ICUCNT, ERCNT, DOCCNT, STHPNM, REG_DTTM, REG_USER, REG_IP, UPD_DTTM, UPD_USER, UPD_IP, HOSP_UUID FROM TBL_HOSP_MST WHERE 1=1
AND ( HOSP_CD LIKE CONCAT('%',#{hosp_cd},'%') OR HOSP_NM LIKE CONCAT('%',#{hosp_cd},'%') )
ORDER BY HOSP_CD , START_DT

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT HM.HOSP_CD, HM.HOSP_UUID, RTRIM(HM.HOSP_NM) AS HOSP_NM, HM.HOSP_ADDR, HM.HOSP_EXTRADR, HM.HOSP_CEO, HM.BUSI_NUM , MAX(IFNULL(CASE WHEN HC.CONACT_GB = '1' THEN (SELECT SUB_CODE_NM FROM TBL_CODE_DTL WHERE CODE_CD = 'CONACT_GB' AND SUB_CODE = HC.CONACT_GB) END , '')) AS NAME1, MAX(IFNULL(CASE WHEN HC.CONACT_GB = '1' THEN DATE_FORMAT(HC.START_DT,'%Y-%m-%d') END , '')) AS START_DT, MAX(IFNULL(CASE WHEN HC.CONACT_GB = '1' THEN DATE_FORMAT(HC.END_DT,'%Y-%m-%d') END , '')) AS END_DT, MAX(IFNULL(CASE WHEN HC.CONACT_GB = '1' THEN DATE_FORMAT(HC.JOIN_DT,'%Y-%m-%d') END , '')) AS JOIN_DT , MAX(IFNULL(CASE WHEN HC.CONACT_GB = '1' THEN DATE_FORMAT(HC.ACCEPT_DT,'%Y-%m-%d') END , '')) AS ACCEPT_DT , MAX(IFNULL(CASE WHEN HC.CONACT_GB = '1' THEN DATE_FORMAT(HC.CLOSE_DT,'%Y-%m-%d') END , '')) AS CLOSE_DT , MAX(IFNULL(CASE WHEN HC.CONACT_GB = '2' THEN (SELECT SUB_CODE_NM FROM TBL_CODE_DTL WHERE CODE_CD = 'CONACT_GB' AND SUB_CODE = HC.CONACT_GB) END , '')) AS NAME2, MAX(IFNULL(CASE WHEN HC.CONACT_GB = '2' THEN DATE_FORMAT(HC.START_DT,'%Y-%m-%d') END , '')) AS START_DT2, MAX(IFNULL(CASE WHEN HC.CONACT_GB = '2' THEN DATE_FORMAT(HC.END_DT,'%Y-%m-%d') END , '')) AS END_DT2 , MAX(IFNULL(CASE WHEN HC.CONACT_GB = '2' THEN DATE_FORMAT(HC.JOIN_DT,'%Y-%m-%d') END , '')) AS JOIN_DT2 , MAX(IFNULL(CASE WHEN HC.CONACT_GB = '2' THEN DATE_FORMAT(HC.ACCEPT_DT,'%Y-%m-%d') END , '')) AS ACCEPT_DT2 , MAX(IFNULL(CASE WHEN HC.CONACT_GB = '2' THEN DATE_FORMAT(HC.CLOSE_DT,'%Y-%m-%d') END , '')) AS CLOSE_DT2 , MAX(CASE WHEN HM.HOSP_CD <> '' THEN HM.UPD_DTTM END) AS UPD_DTTM FROM TBL_HOSP_MST HM LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_HOSPCONT_MST HC ON HM.HOSP_UUID = HC.HOSP_UUID AND HC.CONACT_GB IN ('1', '2') GROUP BY HM.HOSP_CD, HM.HOSP_UUID, HM.HOSP_NM, HM.HOSP_ADDR, HM.HOSP_EXTRADR, HM.HOSP_CEO, HM.BUSI_NUM ) A WHERE 1 = 1
AND ( A.HOSP_CD LIKE CONCAT('%',#{hosp_cd},'%') OR A.HOSP_NM LIKE CONCAT('%',#{hosp_cd},'%') )
ORDER BY A.HOSP_CD , A.START_DT
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_HOSP_MST ( HOSP_CD, HOSP_NM, HOSP_ADDR, HOSP_EXTRADR , HOSP_CEO, BUSI_NUM, INACCD, START_DT, END_DT, JOIN_DT, ACCEPT_DT, CLOSE_DT, ZIP_CD, HOSP_TEL , HOSP_FAX , USE_YN, WARDCNT, ICUCNT, ERCNT, DOCCNT, STHPNM, REG_DTTM, REG_USER, REG_IP, UPD_DTTM, UPD_USER, UPD_IP , HOSP_UUID ) VALUES ( #{hosp_cd}, #{hosp_nm}, #{hosp_addr}, #{hosp_extradr}, #{hosp_ceo}, #{busi_num}, #{inaccd}, REPLACE(#{start_dt} , '-', '') , REPLACE(#{end_dt} , '-', ''), REPLACE(#{join_dt} , '-', ''), REPLACE(#{accept_dt} , '-', ''), REPLACE(#{close_dt} , '-', ''), #{zip_cd}, #{hosp_tel} , #{hosp_fax} , #{use_yn}, #{wardcnt}, #{icucnt}, #{ercnt}, #{doccnt}, #{sthpnm}, NOW(), #{reg_user}, #{reg_ip}, NOW(), #{upd_user}, #{upd_ip} , #{hosp_uuid} )
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_HOSP_MST SET hosp_nm = #{hosp_nm}, hosp_addr = #{hosp_addr}, hosp_extradr = #{hosp_extradr}, hosp_ceo = #{hosp_ceo}, busi_num = #{busi_num}, inaccd = #{inaccd}, start_dt = REPLACE(#{start_dt} , '-', '') , end_dt = REPLACE(#{end_dt} , '-', '') , join_dt = REPLACE(#{join_dt} , '-', ''), accept_dt = REPLACE(#{accept_dt} , '-', ''), close_dt = REPLACE(#{close_dt} , '-', ''), zip_cd = #{zip_cd}, hosp_tel = #{hosp_tel}, hosp_fax = #{hosp_fax}, use_yn = #{use_yn}, wardcnt = #{wardcnt}, icucnt = #{icucnt}, ercnt = #{ercnt}, doccnt = #{doccnt}, sthpnm = #{sthpnm}, upd_dttm = NOW(), upd_user = #{upd_user}, upd_ip = #{upd_ip}, hosp_uuid = #{hosp_uuid} WHERE 1=1 AND HOSP_CD = #{hosp_cd}
mapper.select: SELECT HOSP_CD FROM TBL_HOSP_MST WHERE 1=1 AND HOSP_UUID = #{hosp_uuid}

SELECT HOSP_CD, HOSP_NM, HOSP_ADDR, HOSP_EXTRADR , HOSP_CEO, BUSI_NUM, INACCD, DATE_FORMAT(START_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') START_DT , DATE_FORMAT(END_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') END_DT , DATE_FORMAT(JOIN_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') JOIN_DT , DATE_FORMAT(ACCEPT_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') ACCEPT_DT , DATE_FORMAT(CLOSE_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') CLOSE_DT , ZIP_CD , HOSP_TEL , HOSP_FAX , USE_YN, WARDCNT, ICUCNT, ERCNT, DOCCNT, STHPNM, REG_DTTM, REG_USER, REG_IP, UPD_DTTM, UPD_USER, UPD_IP , HOSP_UUID FROM TBL_HOSP_MST WHERE 1=1 AND HOSP_CD = #{hosp_cd}

SELECT HOSP_CD , START_YM , WARDCNT , ICUCNT , ERCNT , DOCCNT , REG_DTTM , REG_USER , REG_IP , UPD_DTTM , UPD_USER , UPD_IP FROM TBL_HOSP_DTL WHERE 1=1 AND HOSP_CD = #{hosp_cd}
ORDER BY HOSP_CD , START_YM DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_HOSP_DTL ( HOSP_CD, START_YM, WARDCNT, ICUCNT, ERCNT, DOCCNT, REG_DTTM, REG_USER, REG_IP, UPD_DTTM, UPD_USER, UPD_IP ) VALUES ( #{hosp_cd2}, #{start_ym}, #{wardcnt}, #{icucnt}, #{ercnt}, #{doccnt}, NOW(), #{reg_user}, #{reg_ip}, NOW(), #{upd_user}, #{upd_ip} )
mapper.select: SELECT HOSP_CD, START_YM, WARDCNT, ICUCNT, ERCNT, DOCCNT, REG_DTTM, REG_USER, REG_IP, UPD_DTTM, UPD_USER, UPD_IP FROM TBL_HOSP_DTL WHERE 1=1 AND HOSP_CD = #{hosp_cd2} And START_YM = #{start_ym}
SELECT 'Y' FROM TBL_HOSP_MST WHERE 1=1 AND HOSP_CD = #{hosp_cd}
mapper.insert: insert into TBL_HOSP_DTL ( HOSP_CD , START_YM , DOCCNT , WARDCNT , ICUCNT , ERCNT , REG_DTTM , REG_USER , REG_IP ) values ( #hosp_cd# , #strat_ym# , '0' , '0' , '0' , '0' , NOW() , #reg_user# , #reg_ip# )
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_DISE_CODE WHERE 1=1
AND (KOR_DIAG_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#{kor_diag_name},'%') OR DIAG_CODE LIKE CONCAT('%',#{kor_diag_name},'%') )

select DIAG_CODE, START_DT, KOR_DIAG_NAME, ENG_DIAG_NAME, GENDER_TYPE, INFECT_TYPE, DIAG_TYPE, ICD10_CODE, END_DT, MAX_AGE, MIN_AGE, VCODE, DESC_INFO, REG_DTTM, REG_USER, REG_IP, UPD_DTTM, UPD_USER, UPD_IP From TBL_DISE_CODE where 1=1 AND DIAG_CODE = #{diag_code} AND START_DT = #{start_dt}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_DISE_CODE (DIAG_CODE, START_DT, KOR_DIAG_NAME, ENG_DIAG_NAME, GENDER_TYPE, INFECT_TYPE, DIAG_TYPE, ICD10_CODE, END_DT, MAX_AGE, MIN_AGE, VCODE, DESC_INFO, REG_DTTM, REG_USER, REG_IP, UPD_DTTM, UPD_USER, UPD_IP ) VALUES ( #{diag_code}, REPLACE(#{start_dt},'-',''), #{kor_diag_name}, #{eng_diag_name}, #{gender_type} , #{infect_type} , #{diag_type} , #{icd10_code} , REPLACE(#{end_dt},'-','') , #{max_age}, #{min_age}, #{vcode}, #{desc_info}, NOW(), #{reg_user}, #{reg_ip}, NOW(), #{upd_user}, #{upd_ip})
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_DISE_CODE SET KOR_DIAG_NAME = #{kor_diag_name}, ENG_DIAG_NAME = #{eng_diag_name}, GENDER_TYPE = #{gender_type}, INFECT_TYPE = #{infect_type}, DIAG_TYPE = #{diag_type}, ICD10_CODE = #{icd10_code}, END_DT = #{end_dt}, MAX_AGE = #{max_age}, MIN_AGE = #{min_age}, VCODE = #{vcode}, DESC_INFO = #{desc_info}, UPD_DTTM = NOW(), UPD_USER = #{upd_user} , UPD_IP = #{upd_ip} WHERE DIAG_CODE = #{diag_code} AND START_DT = REPLACE(#{start_dt},'-','')
mapper.select: SELECT A.SAMVER, A.TBLINFO, A.VERSION, A.SEQ, A.ITEM_NM, A.SORT_SEQ, A.START_POS, A.END_POS, A.DATA_TYPE, IFNULL(A.DECIMAL_POS,0) AS DECIMAL_POS, IFNULL(A.DATAPROC_YN,'N') AS DATAPROC_YN, A.DB_COLNM, IFNULL(A.LAST_YN,'N') AS LAST_YN FROM TBL_SAMFVER_MST A WHERE A.SAMVER = #{samver} AND A.VERSION = #{version} AND A.SEQ = #{seq} AND A.TBLINFO = #{tblinfo} AND (A.SAMVER LIKE CONCAT('%', #{samver}, '%') or A.VERSION = #{version} or (A.SAMVER BETWEEN #{samver} AND #{prop_1}))
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_SAMFVER_MST ( SAMVER, TBLINFO, VERSION, SEQ, ITEM_NM, SORT_SEQ, START_POS, END_POS, DATA_TYPE, DECIMAL_POS, DATAPROC_YN, DB_COLNM, LAST_YN ) VALUES ( #{samver}, #{tblinfo}, #{version}, #{seq}, #{item_nm}, #{sort_seq}, #{start_pos}, #{end_pos}, #{data_type}, #{decimal_pos}, #{dataproc_yn}, UPPER(#{db_colnm}), #{lastyn} )
mapper.select: SELECT ISNULL(MAX(SEQ),0)+1 FROM TBL_SAMFVER_MST A WHERE A.SAMVER = #samver# AND A.VERSION = #version# AND A.TBLINFO = #tblinfo#

SELECT A.CATE_CODE, A.ORDER_SEQ, CASE WHEN A.START_DT REGEXP '^[0-9]{8}$' THEN DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(A.START_DT, '%Y%m%d'), '%Y-%m-%d') ELSE NULL END AS START_DT , RTRIM(A.CAL_GUBUN) AS CAL_GUBUN , B.SUB_CODE_NM AS WEVALUE_NM, A.START_INDI, A.END_INDI, A.STD_SCORE, A.WE_VALUE, A.REG_DTTM, A.REG_USER, A.REG_IP, A.UPD_DTTM, A.UPD_USER, A.UPD_IP FROM TBL_WEVALUE_MST A INNER JOIN TBL_CODE_DTL B ON B.CODE_GB = 'Z' AND B.CODE_CD = 'WVALUE' AND B.SUB_CODE = A.CATE_CODE WHERE 1=1
AND (WEVALUE_NM LIKE CONCAT('%',#{cate_code},'%') OR CATE_CODE LIKE CONCAT('%',#{cate_code},'%') )
Order by A.CATE_CODE , A.START_DT , A.ORDER_SEQ
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_WEVALUE_MST ( CATE_CODE, ORDER_SEQ, START_DT, CAL_GUBUN, WEVALUE_NM, START_INDI, END_INDI, STD_SCORE, WE_VALUE, REG_DTTM, REG_USER, REG_IP, UPD_DTTM, UPD_USER, UPD_IP ) VALUES ( #{cate_code}, #{order_seq}, replace(#{start_dt},'-',''), #{cal_gubun}, #{wevalue_nm}, #{start_indi}, #{end_indi}, #{std_score}, #{we_value}, NOW(), #{reg_user}, #{reg_ip}, NOW(), #{upd_user}, #{upd_ip} )
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_WEVALUE_MST SET CAL_GUBUN = #{cal_gubun}, WEVALUE_NM = #{wevalue_nm}, START_INDI = #{start_indi}, END_INDI = #{end_indi}, STD_SCORE = #{std_score}, WE_VALUE = #{we_value}, UPD_DTTM = NOW(), UPD_USER = #{upd_user}, UPD_IP = #{upd_ip} WHERE cate_code = #{cate_code} AND order_seq = #{order_seq} AND start_dt = replace(#{start_dt},'-','')
mapper.select: SELECT CATE_CODE, ORDER_SEQ, START_DT, CAL_GUBUN, WEVALUE_NM, START_INDI, END_INDI, STD_SCORE, WE_VALUE, REG_DTTM, REG_USER, REG_IP, UPD_DTTM, UPD_USER, UPD_IP FROM TBL_WEVALUE_MST WHERE cate_code = #{cate_code} AND order_seq = #{order_seq} AND start_dt = replace(#{start_dt},'-','')
